name: Siege_Mech

infobox.Systems: Cluster Artillery(Ranged)EffectProtect a tile by damaging and pushing adjacent tiles.(1 damage)Upgrade IBuildings Immune ()This attack will no longer damage Grid Buildings.Upgrade II+1 Damage ()Increases damage to adjacent tiles by 1.

sections.Team: The mech is available as part of theSteel Judokasquad.
sections.Strategy:
Unlike other ranged weapons, Cluster Artillery does not deal damage on the center of their shot; instead, the weapon deals damage on the surrounding tiles while simultaneously pushing them. This makes the Siege Mech one of the most versatile Mechs in the game, generating a lot of value per action; it can hit and displace several threats at once, simultaneously resolving them and wearing them down. Like similar ranged weapons, it's also useful to push webbing Veks away from your other mechs or objectives.
It is recommended to getBuildings Immuneas soon as it is feasible, since the wide damage area makes it a lot more prone to friendly fire. As of theAdvanced Editionupdate, this upgrade only costs 1 reactor core (instead of 2 previously), at the expense of increasing the cost of+1 Damageto 3 cores (instead of 2 previously). For more open maps that don't require the building immunity, the core can be moved to Move+1 instead as needed. In the Steel Judoka squad, theVek Hormonespassive can also be moved to the Siege Mech to make room for a more useful weapon on theGravity Mech; so the Reactor Core can also go towards increasing the damage of the passive. Thus, the core is never a wasted investment as it can be moved in the early game to suit the missions needs.
The Siege-mech is best deployed in a clear row or column to move through, so that it can flexibly target the entire field from every direction. Best placed further in the back away from enemy spawns, as it's low health can put it at risk of getting webbed and downed. Since it only deals one damage at base, and most Vek come with two or more health, the player should try to use it and push Vek into each other, your own mechs, or water and hazard tiles to immediately kill them.
In terms of pilot choices,Mafanallows his extra reactor core to go into Buildings Immune immediately, and the Zoltan Shield makes up for the fragility of the mech. Other good choices includeKai Millerto immediately boost Cluster Artillery's damage output,Lily Reedto let it deploy away from webbing enemies without sacrificing its positioning, andChen Rongto adjust positioning after firing.
When it comes to secondary weapons to look for, the Cluster Artillery is already very versatile at resolving many situations without additional help. It pairs best with passive effects such asForce Ampto deal additional push damage; or as mentioned earlier, equipping Vek Hormones from the Gravity Mech to make room for a better Science weapon on that Mech.
